creator: petr@petrovich.com.ua
text:
On Sunday 11 September 2005 12:51, Alexander Leidinger wrote:
> Synopsis: [sound] Playing audio on some soundcards with pcm driver may hang
> machine.
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: netchild
> State-Changed-When: Sun Sep 11 09:51:19 GMT 2005
> State-Changed-Why:
> Do you still have this problem with 5.[34] or -current?
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=33532

No, the problem disappeared somewhere in 4.7 - 4.9. Sorry  I cannot tell more 
exact date.

Anyway I do not have problems with sound integrated into this motherboard on 
5.4.
